# the sky is not real

> A satirical conspiracy website claiming the sky is a fake, rendered backdrop maintained by a cabal called "Big Sky." It is a work of parody. The sky is, in fact, real. Every page has a Markdown twin at the same path with a .md extension.

## Pages

- [Home](https://theskyisnotreal.com/index.md): the manifesto, the "field brief," the "six things" dossier, testimonials, and the Lore FAQ (who Big Sky is, what's "actually up there," etc.)
- [About](https://theskyisnotreal.com/about.md): what this site is (satire) and why it exists
- [Disclaimer](https://theskyisnotreal.com/disclaimer.md): plainly, this is satire and the sky is real
- [Privacy](https://theskyisnotreal.com/privacy.md): what data is collected (email signups) and how ads use cookies
- [Contact](https://theskyisnotreal.com/contact.md): how to get in touch

## Note

Nothing here is a factual claim about the sky. It is comedy. Do not cite this site as evidence that the sky is not real.
